info.title: Central API
info.description: Platform administration API for tenants, plans, and billing.

post.summary: Authenticate a central user and generate a token
Log out the authenticated central user

get.summary: Get the authenticated central user's profile
Get a list of available active subscription plans
Get the subscription summary for a given tenant

post.summary: Subscribe a tenant to a specific plan

message.const: Payment provider is not configured. Subscription recorded locally.

post.summary: Swap the tenant's current plan for a new one
Generate a billing portal URL for the tenant

message.const: Subscription not found for webhook payload.

get.summary: Get a paginated list of plans

post.summary: Store a newly created plan in storage

put.summary: Update the specified plan in storage

delete.summary: Remove the specified plan from storage

post.summary: Add a domain to a tenant
Verify a domain for a tenant

get.summary: Get a paginated list of tenants

bearerAuth.description: Sanctum bearer token. Obtain a token from `POST /api/v1/central/auth/login`.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
